evals.prompt: I need to change authorization in this eight-year-old monolith. Explain the architecture and why there are two permission systems before I touch it.
evals.expected_output: Maps runtime authorization paths, excavates migration history, labels rationale confidence, and gives a change-specific safe reading path.

evals.prompt: Onboard me to this repo, but focus on the dangerous historical seams rather than listing folders.
evals.expected_output: Produces an evidence-based field guide, chronology, hotspots, and maintainer questions.
